room.caption: [HV] Not so hidden anymore.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(86)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh19MainA) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh19SideA) solidColor=instance_create(0,1200,oSolidBackgroundColor) solidColor.image_blend=make_color_rgb(80,72,88) solidColor.image_xscale=room_width; solidColor.image_yscale=80
birdSpawner=instance_create(0,0,oSpawnGrayBirds) infiniteDash=instance_create(0,0,oInfiniteDash)
var tempMplay; if global.gameProgress>=4570 {tempMplay=findMusic(27)} else {tempMplay=findMusic(0)} playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=3744 newMapY=288 toRoom=rMain_84 colorChange=1
sprite_index=sNPC_Goemon_Idle image_xscale=-1 talker="Jeremy" stringToShow="He can't decide if he should help you or not. Let's move on for now." boxSize=1

sprite_index=sNPC_EarthwormJim_Idle image_speed=0.12 image_xscale=-1 talker="Jeremy" stringToShow="He seems to be nervous that you're looking at him. It might be best to just leave Jim alone." boxSize=2
sprite_index=sNPC_TheMaster_Idle image_speed=0.12 image_xscale=-1 talker="Jeremy" stringToShow="He'd rather not talk to humans, though I doubt he has any resentment toward you." boxSize=2
sprite_index=sNPC_Sparkster_Idle image_speed=0.12 image_xscale=-1 talker="Jeremy" stringToShow="He isn't in the mood to talk to you." boxSize=1
GID_SET(396259, self.id) npcTag=11 sprite_index=sBubblun_Idle image_speed=0.12 image_xscale=-1
